title: Wyper Pushes the War Forward
description: The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this scene centers on Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall, Luffy. The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This path leads to the God's shrine!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Get down from there, right away!

summary: The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.
